mapper.select:
/* mapper.login.com.erns.coching.LoginDAO.checkPasswd */ SELECT AA.MEMB_SEQ AS SEQ , AA.MEMB_NAME AS USER_NAME , AA.MEMB_ID AS ID , AA.MEMB_TYPE AS USER_TYPE
, AA.EMAIL AS EMAIL , AA.PHONE AS PHONE
, AA.USE_YN AS USE_YN , AA.WTDR_YN AS WTDR_YN , AA.DORMANT_YN AS DORMANT_YN
, AA.PSWD_CHNG_DTTM AS PWD_CHANGE_DATE , AA.PSWD_ERR_CNT AS PWD_ERR_CNT , AA.PSWD_INIT_YN AS PWD_INIT_YN , AA.PSWD_EXP_DTTM AS PSWD_EXP_DTTM
, AA.RCT_ACS_DTTM AS LAST_ACCESS_DATE , AA.RCT_ACS_IP AS LAST_ACCESS_IP
, CASE WHEN AA.PSWD = ENCODE(DIGEST(#{password, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || AA.SALT, 'sha512'), 'hex') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RET_PASS_CHECK_YN
FROM T_MEMB_INF AA
AND AA.MEMB_ID = #{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND AA.MEMB_TYPE != '001'

/* mapper.login.com.erns.coching.LoginDAO.loadUser */ SELECT AA.MEMB_SEQ AS SEQ , AA.PTN_SEQ AS PTN_SEQ , AA.MEMB_ID AS ID , AA.MEMB_TYPE AS USER_TYPE , AA.MEMB_NAME AS USER_NAME
, AA.EMAIL AS EMAIL , AA.PHONE AS PHONE
, AA.USE_YN AS USE_YN , AA.WTDR_YN AS WTDR_YN , AA.DORMANT_YN AS DORMANT_YN
, AA.PSWD_CHNG_DTTM AS PWD_CHANGE_DATE , AA.PSWD_ERR_CNT AS PWD_ERR_CNT , AA.PSWD_INIT_YN AS PWD_INIT_YN , AA.PSWD_EXP_DTTM AS PSWD_EXP_DTTM
, AA.RCT_ACS_DTTM AS LAST_ACCESS_DATE , AA.RCT_ACS_IP AS LAST_ACCESS_IP
FROM T_MEMB_INF AA
AND AA.USE_YN = 'Y' AND AA.WTDR_YN = 'N' AND AA.MEMB_ID = #{value, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

/* mapper.login.com.erns.coching.LoginDAO.loadUser */ SELECT AA.MEMB_SEQ AS SEQ , AA.MEMB_ID AS ID , AA.MEMB_NAME AS USER_NAME
, AA.PHONE AS PHONE , AA.EMAIL AS EMAIL
, AA.USE_YN AS USE_YN , AA.PSWD_CHNG_DTTM AS PWD_CHANGE_DATE , AA.PSWD_ERR_CNT AS PWD_ERR_CNT , AA.PSWD_INIT_YN AS PWD_INIT_YN
FROM T_MEMB_INF AA
AND AA.MEMB_NAME = #{membName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND AA.USE_YN='Y' AND AA.WTDR_YN='N'
